email_subject: Application for Warehouse Operator - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Warehouse Operator position at SD Worx in Heverlee. With hands-on experience in logistics at Katoen Natie and proficiency in SAP, I am confident in my ability to support your warehouse operations effectively.

In my previous role at Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment, handling inbound and outbound goods. I am comfortable with SAP for inventory management and can quickly adapt to your systems. I am also experienced in loading/unloading, quality control, and maintaining an organized warehouse.

I am available to start immediately and open to flexible hours, including occasional late shifts. I am a self-starter who works well in small teams and values safety and efficiency.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to contribute to your team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Warehouse Operator position at SD Worx in Heverlee. With practical logistics experience at Katoen Natie and familiarity with SAP, I am well-prepared to support your production supply chain efficiently.

At Katoen Natie, I worked in a fast-paced warehouse environment, ensuring accuracy in receiving, storing, and dispatching goods. I am experienced in loading/unloading trucks, performing quality checks, and maintaining a clean, safe workspace. I am proficient with SAP for recording inventory movements and can quickly learn your specific procedures.

I am a reliable team player who thrives in autonomous roles. I am available for flexible shifts, including early starts and occasional late shifts, and I am eager to start immediately.

Your description of a varied role in an international setting appeals to me. I am committed to contributing to your team's success through diligence and a proactive attitude.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my skills align with your needs.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025-2026) in high-volume environment
Proficient in SAP for inventory management and warehouse movements
Experienced in loading/unloading, quality control, and maintaining organized warehouse
Strong attention to detail and accuracy in fast-paced logistics
Available immediately for flexible shifts including early starts and occasional late shifts
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Warehouse operator with hands-on logistics experience at Katoen Natie and proficiency in SAP. Skilled in receiving, storing, and dispatching goods, performing quality checks, and maintaining an organized, safe warehouse. Comfortable with flexible shifts and autonomous work in small teams. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp; available to start immediately.

CORE SKILLS
- SAP inventory management & warehouse movements
- Loading/unloading trucks and containers
- Quality control and inspection
- Order picking and sorting by article/batch/order number
- Maintaining clean and safe warehouse
- Self-starter, works well in small teams
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Handled inbound and outbound goods, including loading/unloading
- Ensured timely supply of materials to production

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
